visual_description: In a dimly lit, intimate close-up, a young boy with messy, platinum-blonde hair is the central focus. He is wearing a light-colored t-shirt. His face is contorted in distress, with tears welling in his eyes and streaming down his cheeks. His mouth is open as if he is crying out in pain or fear. To the left, the out-of-focus shoulder and arm of an adult figure are visible, suggesting the boy is being held or comforted. The background is dark and indistinct, keeping the attention solely on the boy's emotional state. The camera remains steady, capturing the raw intensity of the moment. A young boy's voice, high-pitched and filled with raw anguish, cries out desperately, "Jackie! Wake up, Mom! Wake up!" His words are punctuated by the sound of his own heavy, choked sobs, conveying a deep sense of panic and despair. An adult male voice responds with a calm but urgent plea, "TJ, please." The background is quiet, with no music, making the child's emotional distress the central focus of the audio.
